title: Crispy Uruguayan Citrus Skewers
description: A light and citrusy dish featuring basil leaves grilled to perfection with a touch of crunch. Egg-free-friendly for those who need it.

ingredients.name: 1 bunch basil leaves
ingredients.notes: ensure they are fresh and not wilted

ingredients.name: Pinch salt
ingredients.notes: use sea salt for better flavor

instructions: Wash the basil leaves and pat them dry with a clean towel. Slice lemons and limes into thin wedges.
Mix lemon, lime, olive oil, salt, and cut basil leaves together in a large bowl until evenly coated.
Prepare skewers by alternating slices of citrus and basil leaves on each one. Securely attach them to the skewer using toothpicks or by gently pressing them onto the surface.
Preheat grill pan or gas/charcoal grill over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes, allowing it to get hot enough for searing but not burning.

Gently place the prepared skewers on the heated grill. Cover and cook until the citrus slices are golden brown and crispy around the edges (about 3-4 minutes), flipping once halfway through cooking time.
Remove from heat when done, let cool slightly before serving to allow for maximum crispiness.
